hero.title: Maison
hero.subtitle: A quiet villa in the heart of Hanoi — where every ritual is tailored like haute-couture, and every guest is a unique story.

manifesto.title: Luxury is not material.
manifesto.description: Maison de Lumière is not a spa — it is an art villa, where 22 artisans from Paris, Kyoto and Grasse craft each ritual as a personal masterpiece. We serve only 12 guests per day. And each guest, is a world.

signatures.title: Four rituals
signatures.description: Each ritual is personalized based on a 30-minute consultation with a Maître Spa. Ingredients are sourced directly from Paris maisons, Mikimoto Japan, and Grasse.

journey.title: An afternoon at
journey.description: Every ritual is a meticulously orchestrated four-hour journey — from a champagne welcome to a crystal souvenir.

reservation.title: private reservation
reservation.subtitle: Book your private ritual
reservation.description: Our concierge will contact you within 4 hours to confirm and invite you to a private video consultation with a Maître Spa.
reservation.name: Your name

footer.description: Southeast Asia's first haute-couture spa villa — where luxury becomes the language of attention.

contact: 88 Đặng Thái Mai, Tây Hồ, HN
